schema.description: A people batch with processing results.

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the people batch.

idempotency_key.description: The idempotency key provided when creating the batch.

status.description: The current status of the batch processing.

submitted_at.description: The timestamp when the batch was submitted.

completed_at.description: The timestamp when the batch processing completed.

submitted_items.description: The number of items submitted in the batch.

processed_items.description: The number of items successfully processed.

excluded_items.description: The number of items excluded from processing.

results.description: The results for each batch item.

external_id.description: The external ID provided in the batch request.

status.description: The status of this batch item.

idx.description: The index of this item in the original batch request.

uuid.description: The UUID of the created person.

employee_uuid.description: The UUID of the created employee (if role is employee).

errors.description: Errors encountered while processing this batch item.

error_key.description: The key identifying the error source.

exclusions.description: Items excluded from processing due to validation errors.

external_id.description: The external ID of the excluded item(s).

item_count.description: Number of items affected by this exclusion.

schema.title: People-Batch-Results

schema.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided ID/UUID is valid.

error_key.description: Specifies where the error occurs. Typically this key identifies the attribute/parameter related to the error.

category.description: Specifies the type of error. The category provides error groupings and can be used to build custom error handling in your integration.

message.description: Provides details about the error - generally this message can be surfaced to an end user.

errors.message: The requested resource was not found.

schema.title: Not-Found-Error-Object
